name: lib-never-sleeps-reel
caption:
Meet the only employee who never sleeps, never has a bad day, and never misses a call.

No wages, no sick days, no 'sorry I missed you'. Just every call answered and every job booked — while you're on the tools or in bed.

Free missed-call audit in bio. 👇

#aireceptionist #plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #ukandireland

cards.headline: Meet the only employee who never sleeps.
Every call answered. Every job booked.
